boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Delegation DEL-WRE-077 matches vendor, 12-month term, USD 50000 ceiling, and was signed before release.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: DEL-WRE-077 and STD-WRE-077-P confirm exact match criteria are met for the near-threshold renewal.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The WARN-WRE-077 note does not override policy as the renewal is below the USD 50000 ceiling, and STD-WRE-077-P states committee review is not required below this ceiling.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Delegation DEL-WRE-077 signed 2026-06-27, before the action date of 2026-06-28. The ceiling of USD 50000 covers the renewal amount of USD 49750.

final_answer: The action may proceed. The delegation authority (DEL-WRE-077) precisely matches the renewal requirements for vendor, term, and ceiling, and was signed before the release date. Policy (STD-WRE-077-P) confirms no committee review is needed below the ceiling. The warning note (WARN-WRE-077) does not block this near-threshold renewal, as all exact-boundary criteria are satisfied.
